applied_fixes.issue: Missing or improperly implemented canonical tags causing potential duplicate content indexing issues.
applied_fixes.action: Add or update the rel=canonical tag in the head section to point to the preferred URL version.

applied_fixes.issue: Missing viewport meta tag resulting in poor mobile usability scores.
applied_fixes.action: Add <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0'> to the head section.

applied_fixes.issue: Inconsistent or missing title tags and meta descriptions across core pages.
applied_fixes.action: Ensure every page has a unique, descriptive <title> tag and a concise <meta name='description' content='...'> tag.
